review_note: Check routine chronic-care billing and duplicate visits.
Check office-visit frequency and procedure relevance.
Review therapy/utilization frequency and medical necessity.
ECG or emergency evaluation may be relevant with documentation.
Oxygen/DME may be relevant if severity documentation supports it.
High complexity or expensive procedures may require additional support.
Specialty oncology services require diagnosis-treatment alignment.
Medication, labs, and visit complexity should match documentation.
